infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PocketRep uses your microphone for Hey Rex voice intake and wake word detection.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: PocketRep transcribes your voice notes to capture contact info and follow-up plans.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: PocketRep can import your contacts to quickly build your book.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PocketRep uses location to show nearby contacts and proximity alerts.

plugins.microphonePermission: PocketRep needs mic access for Voice-to-Rex.

plugins.photosPermission: PocketRep needs photo access for Rapport Vault.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PocketRep uses location for proximity alerts.
